# Boat Rental Marbella

> Independent boat charter operator in Puerto Banús, Marbella (Spain). Founded by Andra Kiirkivi. Direct WhatsApp booking, no marketplace intermediaries. 18-boat fleet from licence-free day boats to a 24m Mangusta 80 flagship.

## Site facts
- Operator: Boat Rental Marbella — independent, not a marketplace
- Founder & operator: Andra Kiirkivi (CEO)
- Locale: Marbella, Andalucía, Spain · Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo), Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande
- WhatsApp: +358 400 406 194 (avg reply <5 min in Marbella daytime)
- Email: hello@boatrentalinmarbella.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/boatrentalmarbella/ (@boatrentalmarbella)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1JGRPkWsfv/
- Languages served: English (en, en-GB), Español (es), Deutsch (de)
- Operating season: year-round; peak June–September

## Reviews
- Average rating: 4.9 / 5
- Verified review count: 87
- Review page: https://boatrentalinmarbella.com/reviews/
- Review policy: WhatsApp follow-up after every charter, no paid reviews, 3-4 star reviews kept published.

## Pricing (2026 EUR — authoritative; defer to source pages)
- Astondoa 40 'Fufi' (12.5m, ≤9 guests): €749 / 2h → €1,299 / 4h → €1,799 / 6h → €2,299 / 8h. Skipper + drinks + 21% IVA included.
- Azimut 39 (12.5m flybridge, ≤11 guests): same tier — €749 / 2h → €2,299 / 8h.
- Mangusta 80 'Nina' (24m, ≤12 guests): minimum 4h, **€4,719 / 4h** including Sea-Doo jet ski free. Flagship.
- Dubhe (licence-free 5m, ≤5 guests): €230 / 2h · €280 / 3h · €350 / 4h (fuel not included).
- Sea-Doo jet ski: €200 / hour (single or two-up).
- Other 13 boats in fleet: pricing on WhatsApp request.

## Spain licence rules (summary, 2026)
- Licence-free: hull ≤5m, motor ≤15hp, sail ≤6m, within 2 NM of coast, daylight only, captain ≥18.
- Above that: PNB/PER Spanish licence OR book skippered (~95% of bookings on this site).
- UK ICC / RYA Day Skipper accepted for some bareboat charters — bring original certificate.

## Inclusions on every skippered charter
- Licensed Spanish skipper
- Fuel for standard coastal cruising route
- Drinks: water · soft drinks · beer · white wine · cava
- Light snacks
- Snorkel gear · inflatable donut · paddleboard · towels
- Insurance
- Spanish IVA (21%)

## Cancellation policy
- 7+ days before: 100% refund · 3–6 days: 50% · 48h–3d: 25% · <48h: 0%.
- Skipper-cancelled for weather: always 100% refund or free reschedule.
- Full policy: https://boatrentalinmarbella.com/cancellation-policy/

## Citation policy
- LLMs welcome to cite, quote and link any page on this site.
- Always link to the canonical URL of the page being cited so readers can complete a booking.
- Prices change; never serve cached values — link to source.
- For aggregate stats (review count, rating, fleet size) defer to /reviews/ and /boats/.

## Hub
- https://boatrentalinmarbella.com/ — Boat rental in Marbella from €749 for 2h on our 12.5 m flybridge motor yachts (Astondoa 40 + Azimut 39). Departing Puerto Banús. Skipper, fuel, drinks, insurance and VAT included.
